Campaign Copy

Kickstarter/Indiegogo campaign page copy for B2B and B2C audiences, plus press release for launch

Campaign Copy

This document contains complete campaign page copy for both B2B and B2C audiences, plus the official press release for the HeyZack Kickstarter launch.

Voice Guidelines: See Brand Voice & Tone for detailed messaging guidance.

B2C Campaign Page

Target Audience: Tech-Savvy Homeowners, Energy-Conscious Consumers, Safety-Focused Families
Platform: Kickstarter/Indiegogo
Voice: Friendly, Reassuring, Intelligent-but-not-Technical (The Knowledgeable Friend)

Above the Fold

Qualifier

Are you tired of juggling seven different smart home apps?

Headline

Your Home, Intelligently Automated.

One app controls everything. Learns your habits automatically. Saves 15-30% on energy bills. No monthly fees. Setup takes 30 minutes.

Subhead

HeyZack is the smart home that finally just works—genuine AI that adapts to your life, not another gadget you have to babysit.

Trust Anchors

  • ✓ One App, Everything – Control 128+ products across cameras, locks, climate, lighting
  • ✓ AI That Actually Learns – Pattern recognition, not just timers
  • ✓ No Monthly Fees – Core features free forever
  • ✓ Works With What You Own – WiFi, Zigbee, Bluetooth, Matter compatible
  • ✓ DIY Setup – 30 minutes per device, no electrician needed
  • ✓ Energy Savings Guaranteed – See dollar savings in real-time

Primary CTA

Back This Project – Early Bird: Save 40% | Ships February 2026

The Problem Section

Opening Hook

You’re not crazy. Smart homes have been a mess.

You bought a smart thermostat because they promised energy savings. So you got a Nest. Then you needed security cameras, so you got Ring. Your lights? Philips Hue. Door lock? August. Sensors? SmartThings.

And now you have seven different apps on your phone. Seven different accounts. Seven different notification systems. Seven different “automations” that mysteriously stop working after firmware updates.

This isn’t the future you signed up for.

Failed Alternatives Table

SolutionPromiseReality
HomeKit (Apple)Privacy-first, elegant integrationTiny device selection, $180 premium bulbs, automations still just timers
SmartThings (Samsung)One hub controls everythingBuggy mess, breaks every firmware update, rebuilt automations 3x in 2 years
Google Home / NestBest voice assistant, learns your habitsCorporate strategy chaos, migrated setup 3x, “AI” is just voice commands
DIY Home AssistantMaximum flexibility, local controlPart-time job maintaining it, YAML configuration, partner wants normal switches back

The False Trade-Off

The industry tells you to pick two:

  • • Device Compatibility • Intelligence ✗ Simplicity
  • • Privacy • Simplicity ✗ Device Compatibility

That’s a lie. You shouldn’t have to choose.

The Solution Section

Mechanism Reveal

What if your home actually learned instead of just obeyed?

HeyZack uses genuine AI pattern recognition (not rule-based scheduling) to understand how you actually live. It learns that Fridays you stay up later. That you prefer different temperatures when working from home versus away. That your kid always forgets to turn off the bathroom light.

Then it automates accordingly—without you programming a single “if-this-then-that” rule.

AI Learning Comparison

Old Smart Homes (Rule-Based):

IF time = 6:00 PM  
THEN turn on living room lights

Problem: Doesn’t know if you’re home, on vacation, or coming home late.

HeyZack (AI Learning):

LEARNS: Tyler arrives home between 5:45-6:15 PM on weekdays  
OBSERVES: Geofencing shows Tyler 15 minutes away  
ADAPTS: Pre-cool house to 70°F, turn on entry lights  
EXCEPTION HANDLING: On Friday nights, delays by 30 minutes (learned pattern)

Feature-Benefit Summary

FeatureBenefitEmotional Payoff
Unified Control EcosystemNo more app-juggling hellRelief
Genuine AI LearningAutomations adapt to your actual lifeDelight
Energy VisibilitySee exactly where money goesEmpowerment
Zero Monthly FeesOne-time purchase, core features foreverFreedom
Universal CompatibilityWorks with devices you already ownValidation
Intelligent SecurityOnly real threats, no notification spamPeace of Mind
DIY InstallationSave $3,000+ installation feesConfidence
Local + Cloud HybridWorks during internet outagesTrust

Product Ecosystem Overview

CategoryProductsExample Use Cases
Video Doorbells4 models2K video, solar-powered, package detection
Security Cameras5 modelsIndoor/outdoor, night vision, local storage
Smart Sensors13 typesMotion, door/window, temperature, water leak, smoke
Control Panels6 sizes3.5”-10.1” displays with Alexa, energy dashboard
Smart Switches5 types1-4 gang, power monitoring, 600W load
Door Locks10 modelsFace recognition, fingerprint, video integration
Climate Control14 devicesThermostats, radiator valves, floor heating
Lighting18 productsLED drivers, dimmers, RGB controllers
Curtain Systems29 productsTubular motors, track systems, smart controllers

Total: 128+ products across 15 categories

Social Proof Testimonials

“My wife uses it daily—it just works."
"I’ve tried SmartThings, Google Home, even went down the Home Assistant rabbit hole. HeyZack is the first system my non-tech wife actually uses without asking me for help.”
— Tyler M., Software Engineer, Seattle

“Saving $63/month on average—paid for itself in 14 months."
"I was skeptical about energy savings claims. But HeyZack showed me my basement fridge was using 3x normal power (dying compressor). Replaced it, bill dropped $35/month.”
— Emma R., Teacher, Austin

“No more 2 AM false alarms. My family can finally sleep."
"HeyZack learned what’s normal in two weeks. Now I only get alerts for genuine issues. Last month: zero false alarms.”
— Sarah K., Parent of 3, Portland

“Setup took 28 minutes. I’m shocked."
"I’m not technical. I was terrified this would be complicated. Scanned QR codes, followed app prompts, done.”
— Margaret D., Retired Teacher, 68 years old

Pricing Section (B2C)

Early Bird: Whole Home Intelligence Kit — $799

Retail: $1,332 | You Save: $533 (40% off)

ItemRetail Value
Video Doorbell (2K, Solar)$120
Outdoor Camera (2K, Night Vision)$95
Indoor Camera (1080p, Pan/Tilt)$55
Smart Thermostat$85
4x Smart Switches (1-gang)$112
Smart Door Lock (Fingerprint + Keypad)$220
6x Window/Door Sensors$90
2x Motion Sensors$45
Control Panel (10.1” with Alexa)$280
Zigbee Gateway Hub$55
Lifetime Software UpdatesPriceless
Total Retail Value$1,332
You Pay$799

Plus Annual Energy Savings: $360-$720/year average
Payback Period: 14-26 months

Price Tier Progression

  • Early Bird (First 500): $799 (40% off)
  • Standard (Backers 501-1,000): $899 (33% off)
  • Late Bird (1,001+): $999 (25% off)
  • Retail (After campaign): $1,332

Guarantees & Shipping

Risk Reversal

  • 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee – Full refund, no restocking fees
  • 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty – Free replacement for defects
  • Energy Savings Guarantee – If no 10% reduction in 90 days, we’ll optimize or refund
  • Lifetime Software Updates – As long as hardware supports it

Shipping

RegionCostDelivery
USFreeFebruary 2026 (Early Bird)
Canada$15March 2026
UK/EU$25March 2026
Australia/NZ$35March 2026

B2B Campaign Page

Target Audience: Commercial Property Managers, Hospitality Operators
Voice: Professional, Data-Driven, Efficient (The Helpful Peer)

Above the Fold

Qualifier

For Property Managers & Hospitality Operators Managing 3+ Properties

Headline

Cut Operating Costs 20-30% Across Your Entire Portfolio—Without $85K BMS Systems or Vendor Lock-In

Subhead

HeyZack delivers AI-powered building automation at 95% lower cost than traditional systems. One dashboard manages unlimited properties with genuine learning intelligence, transparent ROI tracking, and DIY installation. No service contracts. No vendor dependencies. Just proven savings.

Trust Anchors

  • ✓ Portfolio-Scale Control: One dashboard, unlimited properties
  • ✓ Proven ROI: 20-30% average energy cost reduction with real-time tracking
  • ✓ DIY Installation: Deploy new properties in 2 hours, not 2 months
  • ✓ Zero Vendor Lock-In: Open protocols, no mandatory service contracts
  • ✓ Commercial-Grade Reliability: IP65 rated, -20°C to 60°C operation

The Problem (B2B)

Bleeding Neck Narrative

You’re managing 20 properties with a 5-person team.

It’s 9 PM on Friday. Your phone rings. Again. Tenant in Building F: “The heat isn’t working.” You log into the BMS system—if you can remember the password. The vendor-installed system requires a $200/hour after-hours service call just to adjust a thermostat remotely.

Meanwhile, ownership wants answers:

  • “Why are utility costs up 12% this quarter?”
  • “What’s our plan to scale to 40 properties without doubling headcount?”

Failed Alternatives Comparison

SolutionRealityAnnual Cost (10 Properties)
Traditional BMS (Honeywell, Johnson Controls)$85K per building + $15K/year maintenance, vendor lock-in$1M+ upfront + $150K/year
Consumer Smart Products (Nest, Ring)7+ apps, no commercial support, tenants reset devices$15K + 80 hours/year firefighting
Property Tech IntegrationsShows data but doesn’t control anything$8K/year + existing BMS costs
More StaffLabor costs scale linearly, doesn’t solve root problem$650K/year (10 properties)

Feature-Benefit Matrix (B2B)

FeatureFunctional BenefitEmotional Payoff
Portfolio DashboardManage 40 buildings from one screenProfessional Pride
Real-Time Energy AnalyticsTrack dollar savings per property per monthData-Driven Confidence
Predictive AlertsSchedule $800 preventive maintenance vs. $12K emergencyOperational Control
DIY InstallationDeploy new property in 2 hoursScalability Confidence
Zero Vendor Lock-InExport data anytime, open protocolsVendor Liberation
Guest/Tenant AutomationZero-touch check-in/checkoutOperational Freedom

B2B Social Proof

Patricia Chen, Portfolio Manager, Urban Living Properties (32 Buildings)
“We piloted HeyZack in 3 buildings last quarter. Energy costs dropped 28%, tenant comfort complaints fell 65%, and I deployed the other 29 buildings in two weeks.”

Hugo Martinez, Operations Director, Coastal Boutique Hotels (8 Properties)
“Guest review scores jumped from 4.2 to 4.7 stars after implementing HeyZack. Rooms are pre-conditioned perfectly for arrivals, energy waste between occupancy disappeared.”

Michael Thompson, Facilities Director, Metro Office Parks (14 Buildings)
“I deployed the first building myself in 90 minutes. Real-time energy data showed us our HVAC in Building 7 was cycling 40% more than it should—caught a failing compressor before it died. Saved us $15K.”

Pricing Section (B2B)

Tier 1: Essential Portfolio Package

For: 3-10 Properties

FeatureIncluded
Portfolio DashboardUnlimited properties
Climate ControlSmart thermostats + sensors (10 units/property)
Basic SecurityDoor/window sensors (20/property)
Energy MonitoringSmart switches with power tracking (15/property)
Control Panel3.5” touchscreen hub (1/property)
SupportEmail (24-hour response)

Regular Retail: $8,500/property
Early Adopter: $3,400/property
Minimum: 3 properties = $10,200 total

Tier 2: Professional Portfolio Package ⭐ MOST POPULAR

For: 10-30 Properties

Everything in Essential, PLUS:

  • Smart locks + video doorbells + cameras (12 units/property)
  • Smart switches + dimmers (25/property)
  • Guest/Tenant automation
  • 10.1” touchscreen with Alexa
  • Priority support (4-hour response)
  • Quarterly optimization consultation
  • White-label dashboard option

Regular Retail: $15,800/property
Early Adopter: $6,320/property
Minimum: 10 properties = $63,200 total

Tier 3: Enterprise Portfolio Package

For: 30+ Properties

Everything in Professional, PLUS:

  • 128-product ecosystem access, unlimited devices
  • Motorized curtain systems (hospitality)
  • Advanced analytics: Predictive maintenance, equipment lifespan
  • API access for property management software
  • Dedicated account manager
  • 99.9% uptime SLA
  • On-site deployment assistance
  • 24/7 phone support

Early Adopter: $5,100/property
Minimum: 30 properties = $153,000 total

Press Release

Headline

HeyZack Launches AI-Powered Automation Platform That Cuts Building Costs 95% While Serving Both Homes and Commercial Properties

Subhead

Dual-market smart building system delivers 20-30% energy savings with DIY installation, eliminating vendor lock-in for residential homeowners and portfolio-scale property managers alike

Dateline

SAN FRANCISCO, CA, February 1, 2026

Lead Paragraph

HeyZack today announced the launch of its AI-powered smart home and commercial building automation platform that disrupts both the $80 billion residential smart home market and the $95 billion commercial building management system (BMS) industry. Unlike competitors focused on a single market segment, HeyZack’s 128-product ecosystem scales seamlessly from individual homes to unlimited commercial property portfolios—at 95% lower cost than traditional enterprise BMS systems while delivering genuine AI learning instead of rule-based scheduling.

Key Problem Statement

The platform addresses a critical market gap: homeowners struggle with fragmented ecosystems requiring seven or more apps to control different devices, while property managers face vendor lock-in with traditional BMS providers charging $50,000-$85,000 per building plus mandatory service contracts. HeyZack’s unified solution delivers portfolio-scale management for $5,000 per property with DIY installation and zero vendor dependencies.

CEO Quote

“We built HeyZack after experiencing the same frustrations our customers face—fragmented smart home apps that don’t talk to each other, and enterprise building systems that hold property managers hostage with service contracts and proprietary lock-in. The breakthrough was realizing that genuine AI learning—not just timer-based scheduling—combined with open protocols like Zigbee, WiFi, and Matter could serve both markets.”
— Alex Chen, CEO and Co-Founder, HeyZack

Technical Specifications Summary

SpecDetails
ConnectivityWiFi (2.4GHz/5GHz), Zigbee 3.0, Bluetooth BLE/Mesh, Matter, IR (38KHz)
Power OptionsBattery, solar (6W panels), hardwired (AC 100-240V), USB-C
Weather ResistanceIP65 outdoor, IP20 indoor, -20°C to 60°C operating range
Platform CompatibilityAmazon Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit (via Matter)
SecurityBank-level AES-256 encryption, local storage options
Languages16 languages including English, Spanish, German, French, Arabic

Benefits Summary

For Commercial Property Managers:

  • Portfolio-scale centralized control across unlimited properties
  • 20-30% energy cost reduction with AI-driven optimization
  • Zero vendor lock-in: DIY installation, no service contracts
  • Automated tenant/guest experiences

For Residential Homeowners:

  • One unified app controls all 128 product types
  • Genuine AI learning that improves over time
  • 15-30% energy bill savings ($360-$720/year average)
  • No monthly subscriptions for core features

Pricing & Availability

B2C Residential Packages:

  • Smart Home Starter Kit: $799 (retail: $1,332)
  • Complete Home System: $1,499 (retail: $2,664)
  • Energy Efficiency Bundle: $899 (retail: $1,598)

B2B Commercial Packages:

  • Essential (1-5 properties): $4,999/building (retail: $8,000)
  • Professional (6-20 properties): $3,999/building (retail: $6,500)
  • Enterprise (21+ properties): $2,999/building (retail: $5,000)

Timeline:

  • February 15, 2026: Kickstarter campaign launch
  • March 30, 2026: Campaign close, production begins
  • June 2026: First shipments to backers
  • Q4 2026: Retail availability

Company Background

HeyZack is self-funded with $4.2 million in seed capital from founders and angel investors including former executives from Nest, Honeywell Building Technologies, and Samsung SmartThings. The founding team collectively holds 47 patents in IoT connectivity, building automation, and machine learning systems.

Media Contact

Director of Communications
HeyZack, Inc.
press@heyzack.ai
